case_title: WILLIAMS, DELLA vs. KENNEDY, CECELIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DELLA AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, CECELIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-18-1996
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DELLA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING HEARING SET FOR MAR-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-06-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND 2ND OSC TO PLTF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED BASED ON PLTF'S NON COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL FAST TRACK RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT 2ND OSC. DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CCP 575.2 AND CA CASUALTY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
